containerDefinitions.name: trellis-gpu
command:
set -uxo pipefail; mkdir -p /tmp/trellis_input /tmp/trellis_output /tmp/trellis_model /tmp/trellis_dino /tmp/trellis_rembg /tmp/hf_cache; /opt/conda/envs/trellis2/bin/python3 -c "import boto3; boto3.client('s3',region_name='us-east-1').download_file('nutrition-video-analysis-dev-models-dbenpoj2','production_assets/trellis_runner/trellis_glb_runner.py','/app/trellis_glb_runner.py'); print('runner updated',flush=True)"; /opt/conda/envs/trellis2/bin/python3 -c "import boto3,json,pathlib
s3=boto3.client('s3',region_name='us-east-1')
bucket='nutrition-video-analysis-dev-models-dbenpoj2'
def sync(pfx,local,skip=()):
 local=pathlib.Path(local); local.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
 for pg in s3.get_paginator('list_objects_v2').paginate(Bucket=bucket,Prefix=pfx):
  for o in pg.get('Contents',[]):
   rel=o['Key'][len(pfx):].lstrip('/')
   if not rel or any(rel.startswith(s) for s in skip): continue
   dest=local/rel; dest.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
   if not dest.exists(): s3.download_file(bucket,o['Key'],str(dest)); print('DL',rel,flush=True)
 print('done',pfx,flush=True)
p='production_assets/model_assets/trellis'
sync(p+'/microsoft__TRELLIS.2-4B','/tmp/trellis_model')
sync(p+'/facebook__dinov3-vitl16-pretrain-lvd1689m','/tmp/trellis_dino')
sync(p+'/briaai__RMBG-2.0','/tmp/trellis_rembg',skip=('onnx/',))
pf=pathlib.Path('/tmp/trellis_model/pipeline.json')
cfg=json.loads(pf.read_text())
cfg['args']['image_cond_model']['args']['model_name']='/tmp/trellis_dino'
cfg['args']['rembg_model']['args']['model_name']='/tmp/trellis_rembg'
pf.write_text(json.dumps(cfg,indent=2))
print('pipeline.json patched',flush=True)
import sys,os; sp=os.path.join('/opt/conda/envs/trellis2/lib/python3.10/site-packages'); nvdiff=[x for x in os.listdir(sp) if 'nvdiff' in x.lower()]; print('nvdiff in site-packages:',nvdiff,flush=True)"; /opt/conda/envs/trellis2/bin/python3 -c "import boto3,os,pathlib
s3=boto3.client('s3',region_name=os.environ.get('AWS_REGION','us-east-1'))
input_bucket=os.environ['INPUT_BUCKET']
for name in ['cheeseburger.jpg','fish_n_chips.png','battered_fish.png']:
 out=pathlib.Path('/tmp/trellis_input')/name
 s3.download_file(input_bucket,'trellis-testing/inputs/'+name,str(out))
 print('downloaded',name,flush=True)"; RUNNER_EXIT=0; /opt/conda/envs/trellis2/bin/python /app/trellis_glb_runner.py --images /tmp/trellis_input/cheeseburger.jpg /tmp/trellis_input/fish_n_chips.png /tmp/trellis_input/battered_fish.png --output-dir /tmp/trellis_output --model-id /tmp/trellis_model --preview-seconds ${PREVIEW_SECONDS:-8} --preview-fps ${PREVIEW_FPS:-15} || RUNNER_EXIT=$?; echo "runner exited: $RUNNER_EXIT"; /opt/conda/envs/trellis2/bin/python3 -c "import boto3,os,pathlib
s3=boto3.client('s3',region_name=os.environ.get('AWS_REGION','us-east-1'))
outdir=pathlib.Path('/tmp/trellis_output')
bucket=os.environ['RESULTS_BUCKET']
prefix=os.environ['OUTPUT_PREFIX'].rstrip('/')
for stem in ['cheeseburger','fish_n_chips','battered_fish']:
 for fname,ct in [(f'{stem}.glb','model/gltf-binary'),(f'{stem}.mp4','video/mp4')]:
  src=outdir/fname
  if not src.exists(): print(f'skip {fname} (not found)',flush=True); continue
  s3.upload_file(str(src),bucket,f'{prefix}/{fname}',ExtraArgs={'ContentType':ct}); print(f'uploaded {fname}',flush=True)
src=outdir/'manifest.json'
if src.exists(): s3.upload_file(str(src),bucket,f'{prefix}/manifest.json',ExtraArgs={'ContentType':'application/json'}); print('uploaded manifest.json',flush=True)"; exit $RUNNER_EXIT
/opt/conda/envs/trellis2/bin/python -c 'import torch; print(1 if torch.cuda.is_available() else 0)' || exit 1
